name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at what came through the clinic yesterday — a few new faces reaching out, some appointments on the books, and the usual rhythm of folks getting comfortable with the idea of a visit.

Nothing that needs you right this second. Just wanted you to start the day with the picture in hand, so you can step into the chair-side stuff knowing the front desk is humming along.

Talk soon,
— Bright Smile Dental
